languages.title: Cànan
languages.subtitle: Tagh an cànan a chleachdar air feadh na h-aplacaid.
languages.noResults: Chan eil cànan sam bith a’ freagairt ris an rannsachadh agad.

phone.label: Àireamh fòn
phone.searchCountry: Rannsaich dùthaich, còd, no ro-leasachan dial
phone.noCountries: Chan eil dùthaich sam bith a’ freagairt ris an rannsachadh agad.
phone.tooShort: Tha an àireamh fòn seo ro ghoirid.
phone.tooLong: Tha an àireamh fòn seo ro fhada.
phone.invalid: Cuir a-steach àireamh fòn dligheach airson na dùthcha taghte.

auth.onboardingTagline: Companach sàbhailteachd pearsanta airson na h-amannan eadar “Tha mi ceart gu leòr” agus “tha feum agam air cuideachadh.”
auth.continueOnboarding: Lean air adhart le bhith a’ dol air bòrd
auth.createSubtitle: Tagh modh soidhnidh a-steach gus do ghraf sàbhailteachd a dhìon.
auth.signInFailedMessage: Cha b’ urrainn dhuinn an clàradh a-steach a chrìochnachadh. Thoir sùil air a' cheangal agad is feuch ris a-rithist.
auth.googleUnavailableTitle: Google Chan eil clàradh a-steach ri fhaighinn
auth.googleUnavailableMessage: A’ cleachdadh seisean leasachaidh ionadail. Tha clàradh a-steach dùthchasach Google ag obair ann an togalach leasachaidh.
auth.northStarSubtitle: Pair a-nis no lean air adhart agus cuir ris nas fhaide air adhart.
auth.northStarBody: 'S urrainn dhan VL01 a ghabhas caitheamh sruthan sàbhailteachd a bhrosnachadh le tapan is gluasadan preas fada.
auth.meetCapybearSubtitle:
Do chompanach sàbhailteachd socair air a’ mhapa agus ann an gairmean.
Faodaidh
auth.capybearBody: Capybear cuideachadh le modh dachaigh, modh dìon, modh èiginn, fiosan leisg, agus taic guth.

permissions.locationSubtitle: Air a chleachdadh airson a’ mhapa, sònaichean cunnart, ruighinn sàbhailte, agus co-theacs SOS.
permissions.locationBody: Iarraidh VeryLoving àite gus an tuig an luchd-gleidhidh càit a bheil feum air cuideachadh. Faodaidh tu seo atharrachadh nas fhaide air adhart ann an Settings.
permissions.notificationsSubtitle: Bidh brathan a’ toirt taic do chlàradh a-steach agus tachartasan èiginneach.
permissions.notificationsBody: Cha bhith sinn a’ cleachdadh ach brathan airson sanasan sàbhailteachd, ùrachaidhean èiginneach, agus cuimhneachain a chuireas tu an comas.
permissions.locationRationaleTitle: Tha an t-àite a’ cumail co-theacs sàbhailteachd ceart
permissions.locationRationaleMessage: Cleachdaidh VeryLoving d’ ionad airson a’ mhapa sàbhailteachd, sònaichean cunnart, co-roinn sgiobalta, agus co-theacs SOS. Faodaidh tu seo atharrachadh nas fhaide air adhart ann an Settings.
permissions.notificationsRationaleMessage: VeryLoving a’ cur chuimhneachain clàraidh a-steach, ùrachaidhean èiginneach agus sanasan sàbhailteachd a chuireas tu an comas. Cha bhith sinn a’ cleachdadh brathan airson sanasan.
permissions.microphoneRationaleTitle: Bidh microfòn a’ toirt cumhachd do ghairmean sàbhailteachd
permissions.microphoneRationaleMessage: Chan eil VeryLoving a’ cleachdadh a’ mhicreofon agad ach nuair a thòisicheas tu air companach no gairm sàbhailteachd AI.
permissions.bluetoothRationaleTitle: Bluetooth a' ceangal an so-ghiùlain agad
permissions.bluetoothRationaleMessage: Cleachdaidh VeryLoving Bluetooth gus seudaireachd NorthStar a chàradh, inbhe ceangail a leughadh, agus sruthan sàbhailteachd a bhrosnachadh on nì a ghabhas caitheamh.
permissions.cameraRationaleMessage:
VeryLoving an camara ach nuair a roghnaicheas tu dealbh pròifil a thogail no dealbh sàbhailteachd a cho-roinn.
Cumaidh

tutorial.sharedBody: VeryLoving an sruth seo ri làimh o Settings agus an deas-bhòrd.
tutorial.chooseVoiceSubtitle: Tagh an guth companach a tha a’ faireachdainn as sàbhailte a chluinntinn.
tutorial.emergencySubtitle: Faodaidh còig tapaichean a dhol suas gu SOS agus rabhaidhean dìon.
tutorial.excuseSubtitle: Cruthaich adhbhar gràsmhor airson suidheachadh mì-chofhurtail fhàgail.
tutorial.safetyCallSubtitle: Tòisich gairm companach fìor-ùine nuair a bhios feum agad air taic.
tutorial.practiceSubtitle: Feuch na sruthan sàbhailteachd ann an demo le cuideam ìosal.

jewelry.pairSubtitle: Cùm an seudaireachd faisg air làimh fhad ‘s a tha thu a’ sganadh.
jewelry.noDevices: Cha deach uidheam NorthStar faisg air làimh a lorg fhathast.
jewelry.scanStartFailed: Cha b' urrainn don sganadh Bluetooth tòiseachadh. Feuch ris a-rithist.
jewelry.scanFailed:
Cha b’ urrainn dhuinn seudaireachd faisg air làimh a lorg. Thoir sùil air Bluetooth, cùm NorthStar dlùth is feuch ris a-rithist.
Cha b' urrainn dhan sganadh
jewelry.scanAccessFailed: Bluetooth tòiseachadh. Thoir sùil air inntrigeadh Bluetooth is feuch ris a-rithist.
jewelry.permissionDenied:
Tha ruigsinneachd inneal faisg air làimh dheth. Ceadaich inntrigeadh dha Bluetooth sna roghainnean is feuch ris a-rithist.
Thug
jewelry.connectTimeout: NorthStar ro fhada gus ceangal a dhèanamh. Gluais e nas fhaisge agus feuch ris a-rithist.
jewelry.connectFailed: Cha b' urrainn dhuinn ceangal a dhèanamh ri NorthStar. Dèan cinnteach gu bheil cosgais air agus faisg air làimh, feuch ris a-rithist.
jewelry.emptyTitle: Chan eil innealan faisg air làimh fhathast
jewelry.emptyMessage: Cùm NorthStar fo chasaid is dùin air an fhòn seo, agus an uairsin dèan scan a-rithist.
jewelry.searchingMessage: A' coimhead airson uidheaman NorthStar faisg air làimh…

home.subtitle: Deas-bhòrd companach sàbhailteachd
home.readyBody: Tha guth, mapa, seudaireachd agus luchd-dìon mar aon tap air falbh.

map.title: mapa sàbhailteachd
map.previewSubtitle: Expo Go ro-shealladh; Tha Mapbox a' toirt seachad ann an togail leasachaidh.
map.updateFailed: Cha b’ urrainn dhuinn d’ ionad ùrachadh. Feuch ris a-rithist.
map.notRequested: Cha deach inntrigeadh àite iarraidh. Faodaidh tu a chomasachadh nas fhaide air adhart bho Settings.
map.permissionOff: Tha inntrigeadh an àite dheth. Dèan comas air ann an Settings gus am mapa sàbhailteachd a mheadhanachadh ort.
map.timeout: Tha d’ àite a’ toirt nas fhaide na bha dùil. Gluais am badeigin le comharra nas soilleire agus feuch ris a-rithist.
map.savedEmptyTitle: Chan eil àiteachan air an sàbhaladh fhathast
map.savedEmptyMessage: Nochdaidh àiteachan earbsach a shàbhaileas tu an seo airson ruigsinneachd luath.
map.geofenceEntered: You entered the %{radius}m saved-place safety zone.
map.geofenceExited: You left the %{radius}m saved-place safety zone.

safetyCall.connectingSecurely: A’ ceangal gu tèarainte ri do chompanach guth...
safetyCall.typePlaceholder: Dèan seòrsa ma tha e doirbh bruidhinn
safetyCall.emptyTitle: Bidh do chòmhradh a’ tòiseachadh an seo
safetyCall.emptyMessage: Tòisich a’ ghairm no sgrìobh teachdaireachd nuair a bhios tu deiseil.

chat.notSent: Cha deach an teachdaireachd a chuir.
chat.retryAccessibility: Feuch ri teachdaireachd a chuir a-rithist

history.clearMessage: Bheir seo air falbh teachdaireachdan companach AI a chaidh a shàbhaladh on uidheam seo.
history.cannotUndo: Chan urrainnear seo a chuir dheth.
history.title: Eachdraidh còmhraidh
history.subtitle: AI brathan companach air an sàbhaladh air an uidheam seo.
history.empty: Cha deach còmhraidhean a shàbhaladh fhathast.
history.emptyMessage: Nochdaidh na còmhraidhean companach agad AI an-seo as dèidh do chiad ghairm.
history.loadFailed: Cha b’ urrainn dhuinn eachdraidh còmhraidh a luchdachadh. Feuch ris a-rithist.
history.clearFailed: Cha b’ urrainn dhuinn eachdraidh còmhraidh a ghlanadh. Feuch ris a-rithist.
history.deleteFailed: Cha b' urrainn dhuinn an còmhradh sin a sguabadh às. Feuch ris a-rithist.

voices.title: Mo ghuthan gairm sàbhailteachd
voices.subtitle: Tagh an guth companach a tha a’ faireachdainn ceart airson a chluinntinn.
voices.selectionFailedTitle: Cha deach an taghadh a shàbhaladh
voices.selectionFailedMessage: Feuch an tagh thu an guth a-rithist.
voices.sampleFailedMessage: Cha b’ urrainn dhuinn an sampall guth seo a chluich. Feuch ris a-rithist.

settings.offlineModeSubtitle: Cleachd freagairtean companach cuachta nuair nach eil an lìonra no Hume ri fhaighinn.
settings.privacyBody: Às-phortaich no sguab às an dàta ionadail a tha air a stòradh air an inneal seo.
settings.deleteAll: Thoir às a h-uile dàta ionadail
settings.exportFailedMessage: Cha ghabh an dàta agad às-mhalairt an-dràsta fhèin.
settings.deleteConfirmTitle: Sguab às a h-uile dàta ionadail?
settings.deleteConfirmMessage: Bheir seo air falbh do phròifil, roghainnean, caraidean èiginneach, eachdraidh còmhraidh, cuimhneachain cead, agus seisean ùghdarrais ionadail bhon inneal seo.
settings.deleteFailedMessage: Cha ghabh dàta ionadail a sguabadh às an-dràsta.

sections.privacySubtitle: Eachdraidh, às-mhalairt, sguabadh às, agus poileasaidh

settings.updateFailedTitle: Cha deach an suidheachadh a shàbhaladh
settings.updateFailedMessage: Cha b’ urrainn dhuinn an roghainn sin a shàbhaladh. Feuch ris a-rithist.
settings.signOutFailedTitle: Cha b' urrainn dhuinn clàradh a-mach
settings.signOutFailedMessage: Tha an seisean agad fhathast gnìomhach. Feuch ris a-rithist.

contacts.title: Luchd-conaltraidh èiginneach
contacts.subtitle: Daoine earbsach rim faighinn aig àm sruthan sàbhailteachd.
contacts.name: Ainm
contacts.empty: Cha deach fiosan èiginneach a chur ris fhathast.
contacts.emptyTitle: Chan eil fiosan èiginn ann fhathast
contacts.emptyMessage: Cuir cuideigin ris anns a bheil earbsa agad gus am bi iad deiseil nuair a bhios sruth sàbhailteachd a dhìth orra.
contacts.removeMessage: Cha nochd an neach seo tuilleadh nad shruth èiginn.
contacts.saveFailedMessage: Cha b' urrainn dhuinn an ceangal seo a shàbhaladh. Thoir sùil air an fhiosrachadh agus feuch ris a-rithist.
contacts.removeFailedTitle: Cha deach an ceangal a thoirt air falbh
contacts.removeFailedMessage: Cha b' urrainn dhuinn an ceangal seo a thoirt air falbh. Feuch ris a-rithist.

friends.title: Caraidean
friends.subtitle: Luchd-gleidhidh, iarrtasan, agus graf èiginn.
friends.emptyTitle: Tha an cearcall sàbhailteachd agad falamh
friends.emptyMessage: Nochdaidh caraidean agus luchd-dìon earbsach an seo aon uair ‘s gu bheil iad air an cur ris.

emergency.title: Èiginn SOS
emergency.subtitle: Àrdaich dìreach nuair a tha feum agad air taic sa bhad.
emergency.body: Bheir seo fios don t-sruth sàbhailteachd agad agus ullaichidh e fiosan èiginn.
emergency.notificationBody: Tha an sruth èiginn agad deiseil.
emergency.addContact: Cuir fios èiginn ann an Settings.
emergency.quickShareMessage: Tha stub roinneadh àite deiseil. Ceangail an deireadh-phuing co-roinn backend gus ceanglaichean beò a chuir.

capybearTap.title: Capybear tap
capybearTap.subtitle: Dèan suathadh air an NorthStar agad gus orains sàbhailteachd a leigeil sìos.
capybearTap.body: Tha slighe gluasad-bodhaig deiseil airson sreangadh tachartas BLE.

errors.voiceOffline: Tha thu a’ coimhead far loidhne. Thèid do theachdaireachd a chuir nuair a nì thu ceangal a-rithist.
errors.voiceQueued: Teachdaireachd air a shàbhaladh. Thèid a chuir nuair a bhios an companach guth ag ath-cheangal.
errors.voiceRetrying: A’ feuchainn ri do theachdaireachd a chur a-rithist...
errors.voiceConnecting: A’ ceangal gu tèarainte ri do chompanach guth...
errors.microphone: Tha feum air ruigsinneachd microfòn airson fiosan gutha. Faodaidh tu a chomasachadh ann an Settings, no cuir a-steach teachdaireachd na àite.
errors.billing: Chan eil an companach guth air-loidhne ri fhaighinn airson ùine. Faodaidh tu leantainn air adhart leis a’ chompanach far loidhne.
errors.authentication: Cha b’ urrainn don chompanach guth an seisean seo a dhearbhadh. Clàraich a-steach a-rithist no cleachd an companach far loidhne airson a-nis.
errors.timeout: Thug an companach guth ro fhada airson freagairt. Thoir sùil air a' cheangal agad is feuch ris a-rithist.
errors.network: Cha b’ urrainn dhuinn an companach guth a ruighinn. Thoir sùil air a' cheangal agad agus feuch ris a-rithist no lean ort far loidhne.
errors.genericVoice: Chuir rudeigin stad air a’ ghairm guth. Feuch ris a-rithist, neo lean air adhart leis a’ chompanach far loidhne.

ios.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Feumaidh VeryLoving cothrom air a’ mhicreofon airson sàbhailteachd agus fiosan companach AI.
ios.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Cleachdaidh VeryLoving d’ ionad airson a’ mhapa sàbhailteachd agus feartan sàbhailteachd faisg air làimh.
ios.NSBluetoothAlwaysUsageDescription: Cleachdaidh VeryLoving Bluetooth gus ceangal a dhèanamh ris an t-seudan sàbhailteachd NorthStar agad.

releaseCritical.authUnavailable: Chan eil an roghainn clàraidh a-steach seo ri fhaighinn san togail seo.
releaseCritical.continueAsDemo: Lean air adhart mar dheuchainn (leasachadh a-mhàin)
releaseCritical.demoModeNotice: Chan eil am modh deuchainn a’ cleachdadh ach dàta fuadain ionadail. Chan eil na seirbheisean ceangailte air an dearbhadh, agus thèid an seisean seo ath-shuidheachadh nuair a thèid an aplacaid ath-luchdachadh.
releaseCritical.authCodeInvalid: Tha an còd dearbhaidh mì-dhligheach no air tighinn gu crìch. Iarr còd ùr agus feuch ris a-rithist.
releaseCritical.authRateLimited: Chaidh cus oidhirpean clàraidh a-steach a dhèanamh. Fuirich greis agus feuch ris a-rithist.
releaseCritical.authTimeout: Thug dearbhadh a’ chlàraidh a-steach ro fhada. Thoir sùil air a’ cheangal agad agus feuch ris a-rithist.
releaseCritical.authNetwork: Cha b’ urrainn dhuinn an t-seirbheis clàraidh a-steach a ruigsinn. Thoir sùil air a’ cheangal agad agus feuch ris a-rithist.
releaseCritical.authSessionExpired: Thàinig an seisean agad gu crìch. Clàraich a-steach a-rithist.
releaseCritical.mapUnavailable: Cha b’ urrainn dhuinn am mapa sàbhailteachd a luchdadh. Thoir sùil air a’ cheangal agad agus feuch ris a-rithist.
releaseCritical.mapCachedLocation: Chan eil an t-àite beò ri fhaighinn. A’ sealltainn an àite mu dheireadh a shàbhail thu bho %{capturedAt}.
releaseCritical.locationShareFailed: Cha b’ urrainn dhuinn d’ àite a cho-roinn. Thoir sùil air cead an àite agus feuch ris a-rithist.
releaseCritical.locationShareCurrent: Seo an t-àite agam a chaidh a chlàradh aig %{capturedAt}:
releaseCritical.locationShareCached: Seo an t-àite mu dheireadh a shàbhail mi, air a chlàradh aig %{capturedAt}:
releaseCritical.blePermission: Tha inntrigeadh Bluetooth dheth. Cuir air e sna Roghainnean agus feuch ris a-rithist.
releaseCritical.blePoweredOff: Tha Bluetooth dheth. Cuir air e agus feuch ris a-rithist.
releaseCritical.bleUnavailable: Chan eil paidhreachadh Bluetooth ri fhaighinn air an inneal no san togail seo.
releaseCritical.bleScanFailed: Cha b’ urrainn dhuinn NorthStar a lorg. Cùm faisg e, thoir sùil air Bluetooth agus feuch ris a-rithist.
releaseCritical.bleNoDevices: Cha deach inneal NorthStar sam bith a lorg faisg ort. Cùm faisg e agus sganaich a-rithist.
releaseCritical.bleConnectFailed: Cha b’ urrainn dhuinn ceangal ri NorthStar. Cùm làn-luchdaichte agus faisg e, agus feuch ris a-rithist.
releaseCritical.savePlaceFailed: Cha b’ urrainn dhuinn an t-àite seo a shàbhaladh. Feuch ris a-rithist.
releaseCritical.sosDialerOpened: Dh’fhosgail dialair an fhòn; cha deach a’ ghairm a dhearbhadh.
releaseCritical.sosCancelled: Air a chur dheth; cha deach gairm a dhèanamh.
releaseCritical.sosContactRequired: Cha robh neach-conaltraidh èiginn ri fhaighinn; cha deach gairm a dhèanamh.
releaseCritical.sosDialerFailed: Cha b’ urrainn dialair an fhòn fosgladh; cha deach gairm a dhèanamh.
releaseCritical.sosUnknown: Cha b’ urrainn dhuinn an oidhirp SOS mu dheireadh a dhearbhadh.
releaseCritical.voiceConfiguration: Chan eil an companach gutha ri fhaighinn an-dràsta. Feuch ris a-rithist nas anmoiche no lean air adhart leis a’ chompanaich far loidhne.

medicalProfile.title: Emergency medical profile
medicalProfile.subtitle: Information you choose to share during an SOS
medicalProfile.description: Keep this information current. VeryLoving attaches it only to a connected SOS after you enable sharing; it is not sent through the phone call itself.
medicalProfile.conditionsHint: Enter one per line or separate items with commas.
medicalProfile.allergiesHint: Enter one per line or separate items with commas.
medicalProfile.medicationsHint: Enter one per line: name | dose | instructions.
medicalProfile.emergencyNotesHint: Add details that may help your emergency contacts.
medicalProfile.shareLabel: Include this profile with connected SOS alerts
medicalProfile.shareHint: When enabled, reviewed details may be sent to your synchronized emergency flow.
medicalProfile.consentBody: Saving with sharing enabled records your consent and review time. You can turn sharing off or clear this profile at any time.
medicalProfile.saved: Medical profile saved and review time recorded.
medicalProfile.loadFailed: We could not load your medical profile. Try again.
medicalProfile.saveFailed: We could not save your medical profile. Check the entries and try again.
medicalProfile.clearFailed: We could not clear your medical profile. Try again.
medicalProfile.clearMessage: This removes the emergency medical information stored securely on this device.

medication.title: Medication reminders
medication.subtitle: Schedule home robot reminders and caregiver escalation.
medication.referenceHint: Use a short private schedule reference with letters, numbers, hyphens, or underscores.
medication.noRobot: Pair a home robot before adding medication reminders.
medication.escalationHint: Caregivers are alerted only if the reminder remains unacknowledged.
medication.saveFailed: We could not save this medication reminder. Check the entries and try again.
medication.loadFailed: We could not load medication reminders. Try again.
medication.acknowledgeFailed: We could not acknowledge this medication reminder. Try again.

wellness.title: Wellbeing & connected care
wellness.subtitle: Gentle activities, emotional check-ins, and coordinated device support.
wellness.connectedCareUnavailable: Connected care needs a signed-in account and the VeryLoving service. Local activities and mood history still work on this device.
wellness.scenarioFailed: Connected care could not start or update. Check your connection and try again.

cognitive.title: Cognitive engagement
cognitive.subtitle: Choose a light memory game, a trivia question, or a conversation prompt.
cognitive.connectedBody: Ask your home companion to start a gentle activity and follow its progress here.
cognitive.connectedHint: Starts the cognitive engagement scenario on your account-bound devices.
cognitive.activitySubtitle: There is no score to chase. Pick what feels comfortable today.
cognitive.emptyMessage: Memory, trivia, and conversation are ready whenever you are.

memory.title: Memory cards
memory.description: Notice three symbols, then recall the middle one.

trivia.title: Friendly trivia
trivia.description: Answer a familiar question at your own pace.

conversation.title: Conversation prompt
conversation.description: Use a warm prompt to recall and share a story.

memory.title: Remember the middle symbol
memory.instruction: Take a moment to look at this sequence.
memory.question: Which symbol was in the middle?
memory.incorrect: Good try. Take another look and go at your own pace.

trivia.title: Friendly trivia
trivia.incorrect: Not this time—and that is completely okay.

one.prompt: What color is a clear daytime sky?

two.prompt: What is the largest organ of the human body?

three.prompt: How many days are in a week?

prompts.one: What is a meal that brings back a happy memory?
prompts.two: Who taught you something you still use today?
prompts.three: What song always lifts your mood?
prompts.four: What is a place you would enjoy visiting again?

emotional.title: Emotional check-in
emotional.subtitle: Notice how you feel, save a short reflection, or invite your companion to talk.
emotional.moodQuestion: How are you feeling right now?
emotional.moodHint: Choose the closest answer. There is no wrong choice.
emotional.reflectionHint: Keep it brief. Raw voice audio and transcripts are not saved here.
emotional.reflectionPlaceholder: A few words about this moment...
emotional.privacyNote: Your mood history is account-bound, included in privacy export, and removed with account data deletion.
emotional.saveFailed: We could not save this check-in. Please try again.
emotional.connectedBody: Start a consent-aware Hume conversation through your home companion. A user-started check-in never invents a stress reading.
emotional.connectedHint: Starts an emotional check-in on your account-bound home companion.
emotional.historySubtitle: Only your last 90 private check-ins are retained on this device.
emotional.historyLoadFailed: We could not load your check-in history.
emotional.historyEmptyMessage: Choose a mood above when you are ready.
emotional.deleteMessage: This removes the mood and short reflection from this device.
emotional.deleteFailed: We could not delete this check-in. Please try again.
emotional.humeContextNotice: When you start reflection, your selected mood and optional summary are shared as temporary Hume context. They are not treated as a stress reading.

scenarios.title: Connected care scenarios
scenarios.subtitle: Coordinate your wearable and home companion with clear safety boundaries.
scenarios.connectedCareBody: VeryLoving resolves your paired devices on the server, prevents duplicate actions, and tracks every execution.
scenarios.demoOffline: Demo mode never creates a bearer token, so connected scenarios stay offline. Sign in with a real development account to test the server flow.
scenarios.signInRequired: Sign in again to use connected care scenarios.
scenarios.notConfigured: Connected care is not configured in this build.
scenarios.networkError: The connected care service could not be reached. Your wearable can still work over Bluetooth.
scenarios.stillRunning: This scenario is still running. Refresh its status shortly.
scenarios.genericError: The connected care action could not be completed. Please retry.
scenarios.chooseActionBody: Actions with safety consequences always explain what will happen before they start.

descriptions.fall_detection: Run an analytics-only practice. It never moves a robot or alerts a contact.
descriptions.medication_adherence: Ask the robot to remind you now; unconfirmed reminders can escalate to a caregiver.
descriptions.emotional_check_in: Invite a calming, consent-aware Hume conversation.
descriptions.cognitive_engagement: Invite a gentle robot activity and voice game.
descriptions.ai_angel_auto_dial: Start the confirmed cross-device emergency flow.

confirmations.practiceBody: This records a practice event only. It will not move the robot, call anyone, or send an emergency alert.
confirmations.medicationBody: The robot will remind you now. If you do not confirm within the adherence window, the configured caregiver escalation can run.
confirmations.emergencyBody: This starts the real emergency workflow across your paired devices and may contact your configured emergency contact.
confirmations.cancelCriticalBody: Stopping a critical scenario can end active emergency steps. Continue only if you are sure help is no longer needed.

scenarios.wellnessToolsBody: Check in privately or choose an activity before involving connected devices.
scenarios.recentActivityBody: Status is encrypted, account-bound, and refreshed while work is active.
scenarios.emptyMessage: Start a wellbeing check-in or another quick action when you are ready.
scenarios.started: Scenario accepted. Live status is updating.
scenarios.fallbackNote: A planned fallback completed because a preferred step was unavailable.
scenarios.failedNote: The scenario could not finish. Check device connectivity and try again if it is safe.

feedback.title: Was this helpful?
feedback.message: Tell us whether %{interaction} supported you. We save only the rating, not a free-text response.
feedback.helpfulHint: Records a thumbs-up rating for this completed interaction.
feedback.notHelpfulHint: Records a thumbs-down rating for this completed interaction.
feedback.error: We could not save your rating. Please try again.
